title: View Actuals Page and Weekly Navigation
content:
ACT-001 — View Actuals Page and Weekly Navigation 

Module: Actuals 

Tags: regression, smoke 

Priority: High 

Description: 

Verify that a user can access the Actuals page and navigate between weekly actuals periods using week navigation controls. 

 

Acceptance Criteria: 

User should be able to login to the application with valid credentials. 

User should be able to navigate to the Actuals page. 

User should be able to view the selected week's actuals information. 

User should be able to view the 3-week summary bar displaying Previous, Current, and Future weeks. 

User should be able to view week number, allocation ratio, and status indicator for each week. 

User should be able to click the Previous Week button and navigate to the prior week. 

User should be able to click the Next Week button and navigate to the next week. 

User should be able to open the calendar date picker. 

User should be able to select a date and navigate to the corresponding week. 

User should be able to click Return to Current Week and return to the current week. 

URL should update with the selected week's start date. 

 

Test Data: 

url: https://qa.cioptimize.app 

username: auto.tester@yopmail.com 

password: Test@1234 

weekStartDate: 2026-04-06
